scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly shows the requires side implementation with IngressPerAppRequirer, proper event handling, and charmcraft.yaml configuration. Uses v2 rather than v1 (which the gold standard references), but v2 is valid and more current. The Python API details are accurate for the traefik-k8s library.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — IngressPerAppRequirer, IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, event.url, on.ready, and on.revoked all exist in the traefik-k8s library. The per-unit variant mention is also accurate.
